input.description: Re-run API typecheck and tests after auth hook adjustment

content.text:
Implemented Prompt `T3` from `docs/development-plan-v1.md` section `12.2` and marked it complete.

### What I changed

- Updated `apps/api/src/app.ts` to add the API shell and auth spine:
  - Mounted protected `GET /api/v1`.
  - Added JWKS-backed JWT verification using `jose` (`JWT_ISSUER`, `JWT_AUDIENCE`, `JWT_JWKS_URI`).
  - Enforced auth on all routes except `GET /health` (unsigned requests get `401`).
  - Added request correlation handling:
    - Accepts/propagates `x-request-id`.
    - Sets `request.request_id`.
    - Returns `request_id` in error responses.
  - Added consistent API error responses (`{ code, message, request_id }`) via `apiErrorSchema`.
  - Added `404` not-found handler with the same error shape.

- Expanded `apps/api/src/app.test.ts` with mocked JWKS integration tests:
  - Starts a local JWKS server in test.
  - Signs valid JWTs against generated test keys.
  - Verifies:
    - `/health` works without auth.
    - `/api/v1` rejects unsigned and invalid tokens.
    - `/api/v1` accepts valid JWTs from mocked JWKS.
    - `x-request-id` propagation.

- Updated config/docs:
  - Added JWT placeholders to `.env.example`.
  - Marked `Prompt T3` as done in `docs/development-plan-v1.md` (`DONE 2026-04-30`).
  - Added `jose` to `apps/api/package.json` (and updated `package-lock.json`).

### Verification run

- `npm run typecheck -w @memories/api` ✅
- `npm run test -w @memories/api` ✅ (4/4 passing)

If you want, I can move straight to implementing `Prompt T4` next.
